parents.subject: LU-13814 lov: remove non-dio handling in lov_dio_submit

commit.subject: LU-13814 vvp: remove vvp slice for transient pages
commit.message:
LU-13814 vvp: remove vvp slice for transient pages

The vvp layer no longer does anything for transient pages
and can just be removed.

This patch could be moved earlier in the series but is
trivial, so seems fine here.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I451fa1860a5961c87d251a1ac2f044bf818556ee
